title: USDC Value Decoder Unit Contract

included: Crate value representation payload, type, and flag decoding
token index resolution through the token capability
path index resolution through the path capability
double3 vector values used by initial fixtures
deferred: references, payloads, relocates, inherits, and specializes
all Crate value types not used by the first fixture set
Crate value types introduced at minor version 10 or later (Splines, Relocates, PathExpression)
value resolution or schema fallback semantics

model.ValueRepresentationWord: Single 8-byte little-endian word containing payload[0..6), type at byte 6, and flags at byte 7. Decoders must read this word once per representation and dispatch by type and flags. Multiple per-byte reads, per-field-name dispatch, or section byte string scans are contract violations.
model.ValueRepresentation: Decoded Crate value representation record containing payload, type, and representation flags.
model.OffsetValueView: Offset-backed scalar and array values are returned as non-owning byte views into the opened resource byte view. The decoder must not materialize parser-local copies of the offset data before canonicalization.
model.ValueTables: Decoded token, string, and path tables supplied by the section parser.
model.DecodedFieldValue: Target-native value supplied to the document model, with canonical JSON materialized only at adapter/dump boundaries.

input.representation: raw Crate value representation bytes or integer payload
input.tables: token, string, and path table handles

input.type: token, string, bool, int, float, double, specifier, or variability
dimensioned type name such as double3

laws: value type dispatch is driven by the 1-byte type code and 1-byte flags read from the 8-byte value representation word; field-name substring matches and section byte text scans are contract violations
offset-backed scalar and array values must be returned by view into the opened resource byte view until value canonicalization runs
inlined and offset-backed scalars of the same value type must share a single decoded value shape
token values must use the token identity capability before canonical JSON output
path values must use the path capability before canonical JSON output
foundational scalar and vector values must conform to contracts/value.schema.json
PathListOp values must be supplied by the authored listOp boundary
unknown required value types fail clearly rather than producing placeholder JSON
value types introduced at Crate 0.10.0 or later (Splines, Relocates, PathExpression) must emit a clear UnsupportedUsdcFeature diagnostic; they must not produce placeholder JSON or be silently dropped
this contract does not traverse Crate sections or create document-model specs
this contract must not call USDA text value parsing

adapter_protocol.input: A JSON file containing one case with an ops array. Cases provide decoded tables and representation payloads.
adapter_protocol.output: A JSON object with ok, diagnostics, and results.
